entries.title: Gorilla Rental — Company Overview & Operations
entries.summary: Gorilla Rental is a South Florida aerial work platform rental company serving Broward County (primary), Miami-Dade, and Palm Beach. They offer boom lifts (40ft–125ft), scissor lifts (32ft electric), scaffolding, shore posts, and overhead protection to general contractors, painters, landscapers, roofers, drywall, framing, and excavation companies.
keyFacts: Service area: South Florida — Broward County (primary), Miami-Dade, Palm Beach
Boom Lifts: 40ft to 125ft reach (electric and diesel)
Scissor Lifts: 32ft electric
Scaffolding: modular, daily rate
Shore Posts: monthly rate
Overhead Protection offered
Delivery fee: $200.00
Refundable deposit: $150.00 per rental
Florida sales tax: 7%
Driver Andrei: +14474744549
Driver Nazar: +17860000000
Email: info@gorillarental.us
Website: gorillarental.us
entries.competitiveIntel: Gorilla Rental differentiates through a wide boom lift range (up to 125ft), a flat $200 delivery fee with delivery included, and a low $150 refundable deposit — positioning competitively for South Florida contractors needing flexible aerial work platform rentals.
technicalKnowledge: Boom lifts available in both electric and diesel variants, ranging from 40ft to 125ft reach
Scissor lifts are 32ft electric models
Scaffolding is modular and rented on a daily rate basis
Shore posts are rented on a monthly rate basis
businessInsights: Primary market is Broward County with expansion coverage into Miami-Dade and Palm Beach
Target customers span multiple construction trades: general contractors, painters, landscapers, roofers, drywall, framing, and excavation companies
Flat delivery fee model ($200) simplifies pricing and customer decision-making
Refundable deposit structure ($150) lowers barrier to entry for new customers
Small driver team (2 drivers) suggests lean operations — scaling deliveries may become a bottleneck
actionItems: Ensure all driver contact information is kept current in the system
Monitor delivery capacity — with only 2 drivers, scheduling optimization is critical
Consider expanding service area marketing beyond Broward to grow Miami-Dade and Palm Beach share
Maintain up-to-date pricing for all equipment categories including scaffolding daily rates and shore post monthly rates

No product offerings, pricing, or service area information is currently available on their site

entries.title: Sunbelt Rentals - Equipment & Tool Rental Company
entries.summary: Sunbelt Rentals is a major equipment and tool rental company with over 14,000 types of equipment across 950+ locations. They recently began trading on the NYSE under ticker 'SUNB' and offer aerial work platforms among their extensive catalog, making them a direct competitor to Gorilla Rental in South Florida.
keyFacts: Sunbelt Rentals offers over 14,000 types of equipment for rent
They operate 950+ locations across the U.S.
Sunbelt Rentals is now publicly traded on the NYSE under ticker symbol 'SUNB'
They offer aerial work platforms, scaffolding, and ladders as a product category
They provide both in-store pickup and round-trip delivery options
They allow rental extensions by phone
Their tagline emphasizes 'Own Less, Create More – the Power of Rental'
They position themselves as having 'a team of rental experts' providing 'thoughtful solutions'
They serve industrial, manufacturing, civil construction, healthcare, and facility maintenance sectors
entries.competitiveIntel: Sunbelt Rentals is a massive national competitor with 950+ locations and NYSE-listed financial backing, giving them significant scale advantages. They compete directly in the aerial work platform category. Their messaging emphasizes expert guidance, safety-first positioning, and the cost-saving benefits of renting over buying. They offer online browsing with add-to-cart and quote-request functionality, plus flexible pickup/delivery options. Their broad catalog (14,000+ equipment types) means they can cross-sell and serve as a one-stop-shop, which smaller specialists like Gorilla Rental cannot easily match. However, their size may mean less personalized service and slower response times in specific local markets like South Florida, which is an advantage Gorilla Rental can exploit.
technicalKnowledge: Sunbelt Rentals categorizes aerial work platforms alongside scaffolding and ladders
They offer specialty resources for confined space work equipment requirements
Their equipment catalog spans cooling, heating, drying, and indoor air quality equipment in addition to aerial platforms
businessInsights: Sunbelt's NYSE listing (SUNB) signals aggressive growth plans and access to capital markets for expansion
Their 'Own Less, Create More' messaging targets cost-conscious businesses — Gorilla Rental should develop similar ROI-focused messaging for boom and scissor lift rentals
Sunbelt's emphasis on safety-first positioning suggests safety credentials are a key differentiator in the rental industry
Their online cart and quote-request system sets customer expectations for digital rental workflows — Gorilla Rental should ensure a competitive online experience

Sunbelt promotes content marketing around cost savings (scaffolding rental, concrete flooring costs) — Gorilla Rental could create similar educational content specific to aerial work platforms in South Florida
Being a large national chain, Sunbelt may lack the hyper-local expertise and rapid response that a South Florida specialist like Gorilla Rental can offer
actionItems: Differentiate Gorilla Rental by emphasizing local South Florida expertise, faster delivery times, and personalized service vs. Sunbelt's national chain model
Develop competitive pricing intelligence by requesting quotes from Sunbelt for comparable boom lift and scissor lift rentals in South Florida
Create educational content around aerial work platform safety and cost savings to compete with Sunbelt's content marketing strategy
Ensure Gorilla Rental's website offers easy online quote requests and equipment browsing to match customer expectations set by Sunbelt
Monitor Sunbelt's South Florida location expansion given their new NYSE capital access
Highlight Gorilla Rental's specialization in aerial work platforms as an advantage over Sunbelt's generalist 14,000-equipment approach

entries.title: United Rentals – Trusted Equipment Fleet & Worksite SolutionsUnited Rentals
entries.summary: United Rentals is the world's largest rental equipment company, offering 3,300+ equipment and tool classes for industrial and construction sites across the United States and Canada. They provide comprehensive worksite solutions including aerial equipment, power & HVAC, trench safety, storage, emergency response, and serve multiple industries including oil & gas, chemical, and civil infrastructure.
keyFacts: United Rentals is the world's largest rental equipment company
Offers 3,300+ equipment and tool classes
Operates across the United States and Canada, plus European presence
Provides AI-powered chatbot for customer assistance on their website
Offers mobile app for 24/7 equipment browsing, renting, and pickup requests
Has a used equipment sales program (Spring Sales Events at participating locations)
Provides United Academy certification training for safety
Offers government customer tax exemption sign-in portal
Has sustainability-focused equipment catalog allowing search by emission level
Serves multiple verticals: chemical, oil & gas, oilfield services, distribution, civil & infrastructure
entries.competitiveIntel: United Rentals positions itself as the world's largest equipment rental company with a massive 3,300+ equipment class catalog — far broader than a niche aerial lift provider. They are investing heavily in technology (AI chatbot, mobile app, custom dashboards, notifications) and sustainability (emission-level equipment search). They offer Worksite Performance Solutions for full jobsite management, positioning as a one-stop-shop rather than a specialized provider. They also sell used equipment at seasonal events, creating a secondary revenue stream. Their scale includes operations in the US, Canada, and Europe with multilingual support (English, Spanish, French, German, Dutch). No specific pricing is listed on their homepage. Their breadth is a strength but also a weakness — Gorilla Rental can differentiate through specialized aerial lift expertise, local South Florida focus, faster/more personal service, and competitive pricing without the overhead of a massive national operation.
technicalKnowledge: Equipment categories include: aerial attachments & safety accessories, skid steers & compact track loaders, straight mast rough terrain forklifts
Solutions span: Power & HVAC, Fluid Solutions, Trench Safety, Onsite Services, Storage Containers & Mobile Offices, Emergency Response
Equipment can be filtered by emission level for sustainability compliance
businessInsights: United Rentals is investing heavily in digital tools (AI chatbot, mobile app, custom dashboards) to improve customer experience and lock-in — Gorilla should invest in digital convenience too
Their broad 3,300+ equipment class offering means they are not specialized — Gorilla can win by being the aerial lift expert in South Florida
United Rentals claims online requests get responses 2x faster than email/fax — speed of response is a key competitive differentiator
They serve government customers with tax-exempt portals — Gorilla should consider targeting government/municipal contracts in South Florida
Their used equipment sales events suggest fleet turnover strategy — Gorilla could monitor these for acquisition opportunities
Their sustainability positioning (emission-level search) reflects growing market demand for green equipment options
actionItems: Emphasize Gorilla Rental's local South Florida expertise and faster, more personalized service vs. United Rentals' national corporate approach
Monitor United Rentals Spring Sales Events for potential used aerial equipment acquisition opportunities at competitive prices
Develop a simple mobile-friendly booking/contact system to compete with United Rentals' app convenience
Consider targeting government and municipal aerial lift rental contracts in South Florida with tax-exempt billing
Highlight specialization in aerial work platforms as a competitive advantage over United Rentals' generalist 3,300-class catalog
Ensure response times to customer inquiries are faster than United Rentals to win on service quality
Consider offering sustainability-focused equipment options (electric/hybrid boom and scissor lifts) to match market trends
entries.rawContent:

entries.title: Herc Rentals – Equipment & Tool Rental Solutions
entries.summary: Herc Rentals is a major national equipment and tool rental company with 600+ locations across North America, offering daily, weekly, and monthly rates. They recently acquired H&E Rentals and provide a broad range of equipment categories including aerial lifts, with services like delivery, 24/7 emergency support, safety training, and live delivery tracking.
keyFacts: Herc Rentals has 600+ locations across North America
H&E Rentals has been acquired by and is now part of Herc Rentals
They offer daily, weekly, and monthly rental rates
They provide delivery and pickup to/from job sites with live delivery tracking
24/7 emergency service is available for breakdowns and after-hours support
They offer safety training for equipment operators
No CDL required for most rented equipment
Customer solutions team reachable at 1(833)-311-0247
They sell competitively priced used equipment with warranty protection plans
Equipment categories include Aerial, Earthmoving, Material Handling, Power Generation, Climate Control, and many more
They serve data center and digital infrastructure projects
They serve the utility industry including emergency response
entries.competitiveIntel: Herc Rentals is now significantly larger after acquiring H&E Rentals, expanding their footprint to 600+ locations. They compete on breadth of equipment selection, national scale, technology (live delivery tracking, fleet telematics), and 24/7 service. They sell used equipment with warranty plans, creating an additional revenue stream and customer touchpoint. Their focus on specialized verticals like data centers and utilities shows strategic market segmentation. They do not publish specific pricing online, suggesting negotiated/custom pricing. Their massive scale and national presence is a key differentiator that Gorilla Rental cannot match, but Gorilla can compete on local South Florida expertise, personalized service, and potentially faster/more flexible response times.
technicalKnowledge: Herc Rentals equipment categories: Aerial, Air Compressors & Tools, Climate Control, Compaction & Paving, Concrete & Masonry, Earthmoving, Floor Care & Surface Prep, Material Handling, Power Generation, ProContractor tools, Pumps, Remediation & Restoration, Construction equipment, Heavy equipment, Trucks & Trailers
Most rental equipment does not require a CDL to operate, though specific equipment may have different requirements
They offer fleet and telematics solutions for equipment management
businessInsights: Herc Rentals' acquisition of H&E Rentals signals continued consolidation in the equipment rental industry, putting pressure on smaller regional players
Their investment in technology (live delivery tracking, telematics) sets customer experience expectations that smaller competitors like Gorilla Rental should be aware of
Herc's focus on data centers and utilities as verticals shows where large-scale rental demand is growing
Used equipment sales with warranty protection is a business model worth considering for Gorilla Rental
National players emphasize breadth and scale; local specialists like Gorilla Rental should emphasize depth of knowledge, speed, and personalized relationships in South Florida
actionItems: Monitor Herc Rentals' South Florida branch locations and pricing to understand local competitive positioning
Differentiate Gorilla Rental through superior local response times, personalized service, and South Florida market expertise that national chains struggle to match
Consider implementing delivery tracking technology to meet rising customer expectations set by national competitors
Evaluate offering used equipment sales as an additional revenue stream
Highlight Gorilla Rental's aerial work platform specialization vs. Herc's generalist approach — specialists often deliver better expertise and service in their niche
Ensure 24/7 emergency support capability to match national competitor service levels
Track the post-merger integration of H&E into Herc for potential disruption that could create customer acquisition opportunities

The site has been taken over by or redirects to an Indonesian online gambling/togel platform called Kpktoto
No aerial work platform, boom lift, or scissor lift rental information is available on this URL
The domain may have expired, been hacked, or been repurposed
entries.competitiveIntel: Neff Rental (neffrental.com) appears to no longer have an active, legitimate website. If Neff Rental was a competitor in the South Florida aerial work platform rental market, their web presence is effectively non-existent or compromised. This represents a potential opportunity for Gorilla Rental to capture any customers who previously found Neff Rental online, as those visitors will now encounter a spam/gambling site and look elsewhere.
businessInsights: A competitor's domain being compromised or abandoned signals potential market opportunity for Gorilla Rental to capture their former customers
This highlights the importance of maintaining domain security and renewals — Gorilla Rental should ensure its own domain registrations are secure and auto-renewing
Customers searching for Neff Rental will encounter a spam site, damaging trust — Gorilla Rental could target SEO keywords associated with Neff Rental to capture redirected search traffic

Consider targeting SEO keywords related to 'Neff Rental' or 'neff rental South Florida' to capture displaced customers
Audit Gorilla Rental's own domain security, SSL certificates, and renewal status to prevent similar issues
Monitor other competitor websites periodically for similar domain lapses that could present market opportunities

entries.title: BrandSafway Scaffolding Systems | Industrial, Commercial, and Infrastructure Solutions
entries.summary: BrandSafway is a leading global provider of access, scaffolding, specialized services, and forming/shoring solutions serving industrial, commercial, and infrastructure markets. They operate approximately 340 locations across 25 countries and emphasize safety through their proprietary Employee Intervention System (EIS). They offer scaffolding and access equipment rentals along with custom solutions.
keyFacts: BrandSafway is a leading global provider of access and scaffolding solutions
Operates approximately 340 locations in 25 countries
Serves industrial, commercial, and infrastructure markets
Offers scaffolding and access equipment rentals
Uses a proprietary Employee Intervention System (EIS) for safety
Provides custom access and scaffolding solutions
Tagline is 'At Work For You®'
Focuses on productivity and lowest installed project cost
entries.competitiveIntel: BrandSafway is a major global competitor in the access equipment and scaffolding space, but their primary focus is scaffolding systems and industrial services rather than boom lift and scissor lift rentals specifically. Their scale (340 locations, 25 countries) makes them a large enterprise competitor, but they are more scaffolding-focused than aerial work platform-focused. Their value proposition centers on 'lowest installed project cost' and safety — Gorilla Rental can differentiate by emphasizing specialized boom/scissor lift expertise, local South Florida knowledge, faster response times, and more personalized service compared to this global corporation. No specific pricing information was found.
technicalKnowledge: Employee Intervention System (EIS) is a kaizen-based behavioral safety process
EIS focuses on hazard recognition and control through employee coaching
Employees are empowered to stop work when unsafe conditions are identified
BrandSafway offers access equipment, scaffolding, forming, and shoring solutions
businessInsights: Large competitors like BrandSafway compete on global scale and breadth of product offerings
Safety programs and certifications are a key differentiator and selling point in the access equipment industry
BrandSafway's focus on 'lowest installed project cost' suggests price competition at the enterprise level
Gorilla Rental can compete by offering specialized aerial work platform expertise vs. BrandSafway's broader scaffolding focus
Local, nimble service in South Florida is a competitive advantage against a global corporation with 340 locations
actionItems: Highlight Gorilla Rental's specialization in boom lifts and scissor lifts as an advantage over generalist competitors like BrandSafway
Develop and promote a safety program or certification to match enterprise-level competitor safety messaging
Emphasize local South Florida expertise, fast delivery, and personalized service as differentiators
Target customers who may find BrandSafway too large/slow for their aerial lift rental needs
Consider creating marketing content that positions specialized AWP rental vs. general scaffolding/access solutions
entries.rawContent:
BrandSafway Scaffolding Systems | Industrial, Commercial, and Infrastructure Solutions

At Work For You®

BrandSafway Scaffolding Systems | Industrial Services. Scaffolding and Industrial Services, optimum safety and productivity, lowest installed project cost

BrandSafway is a leading global provider of access, specialized services, and forming and shoring solutions to the industrial, commercial and infrastructure markets.AT WORK FOR YOU®We deliver more value by helping customers improve productivity and safety on every jobsite.
Learn about our commitment to safety.
With approximately 340 locations in 25 countries, we're everywhere you need us to be.
Contact us to rent scaffolding and access equipment with ease.
Explore the broadest range of access and scaffolding products available, work with an expert on a custom solution, and learn about our extended services as well.
Industry-leading depth and range
BrandSafway's Employee Intervention System (EIS) was developed to stop accidents before they happen. A proactive, behavioral-based process, the EIS helps prevent poor decisions in the hazard recognition and control process. This kaizen-based system identifies potential hazards associated with the environment, projects and work practices, allowing us to anticipate and prevent accidents by coaching employees on correct behaviors. Through the EIS, employees are empowered and obligated to stop work whenever they think an unsafe condition exists. This employee-driven program allows us to stay on the cutting edge of safety through continuous improvement.

entries.rawContent:
Home | Genie - Quality by Design | Boom Lifts | Scissors | Telehandlers

We deliver the Quality your business needs: Durable equipment, expert support, and dependable parts.

Genie® articulated boom lifts, telescopic boom lifts, scissor lifts and telehandler products  are used in a wide range of industries around the world. 

Access and download manuals for any Genie equipment online anytime. The manuals provide essential information on safety rules, guides to controls, pre-operation inspections, operation instructions, maintenance guidelines and more.
Genie makes your parts ordering hassle-free by phone, fax or online. Our extensive parts network ships to locations around the world, with almost all orders processed in 24 hours. Quickly and easily find and order the Genie® Genuine parts, accessories and service tools you need. With the Genie Serial Number Smart Parts Lookup System, you’re just a few fast clicks away from what you’re looking for.
Looking for your local Genie rental partner or distributor? Enter your location information (as easy as your ZIP code) and the product category you’re interested in into the Genie Dealer Locator, and addresses, maps and links will point you toward Genie equipment distributors within the 25 to 200-mile radius you specify.
All the extras you get from Genie to support your business after a purchase: Equipment financing, product registration, warranty, safety notices, technical services and support, training and more!

entries.title: Agency - Start Bootstrap Theme
entries.summary: The URL hy-brid.com leads to a digital agency called Hybrid, not the aerial work platform manufacturer Hy-Brid Lifts (which operates at hybridlifts.com). This is a digital strategy, production, and management agency founded in 2008 in Pittsburgh, with no relevance to the aerial work platform industry.
keyFacts: hy-brid.com is a digital agency, not the Hy-Brid Lifts scissor lift manufacturer
The actual Hy-Brid Lifts manufacturer of low-level scissor lifts operates at hybridlifts.com
This Hybrid agency focuses on digital strategy, production, and management services
Founded in 2008 in Pittsburgh, PA
businessInsights: The URL hy-brid.com does not correspond to the aerial work platform manufacturer Hy-Brid Lifts — any research into Hy-Brid Lifts equipment should reference hybridlifts.com instead
Domain name confusion highlights the importance of verifying manufacturer websites when sourcing equipment information
actionItems: If researching Hy-Brid Lifts low-level scissor lifts, use the correct URL: hybridlifts.com
Disregard this source as it has no relevance to the aerial work platform rental industry
entries.rawContent:
Agency - Start Bootstrap Theme

Hybrid's services are organized across three distinct channels:
STRATEGY - connecting a clients vision with what is possible (time + money)
PRODUCTION - designing and building digital products and services.
MANAGEMENT - supporting, updating and monitoring published digital products and services.
Digital technology is disrupting organizations, wreaking havoc on well-established business models and upending entire industries. Hybrid’s Strategy practice helps senior executives anticipate and adapt to these trends — accelerating growth and transforming their brands and businesses for success in the digital world.
When we say digital production, we mean it. Front end dev, Back end dev, APP dev, Audio & Imaging. Build for the mobile-centric web or transform your business to fit in with the modern cross-platform reality with Hybrid. Drawing upon extensive UI/UX design and front-end development expertise, we deliver rich web app experiences that are a hit with end users.
We have been advocates for a wide range of clients collaborating, recommending and supervising the purchasing, set-up, configuration and implementation of the hardware and network platforms for a major city, to ,enabling real-time mobile video training for NGO's. We specialize in purchasing recommendations for government agencies and businesses.
Hybrid began in 2008 when a group of 9 to 5 agency workers decided to create a fictional band website, app, PC game and animated music video for submission to the American Advertising Awards in Pittsburgh. Our work won Gold, and the story began.

						Hybrid focuses on pioneering digital solutions. We do this by synthesizing new ideas and old ones building the infrastructure for emerging media channels and helping clients find new life in the digital space.
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur.

entries.title: IPAF - The International Powered Access Federation
entries.summary: IPAF (International Powered Access Federation) promotes safe and effective use of powered access equipment worldwide, providing technical advice, training, safety resources, and influencing legislation. The organization offers operator certification (PAL Cards), toolbox talks on battery safety, accident reporting systems, and hosts industry events globally.
keyFacts: IPAF is the International Powered Access Federation promoting safe use of powered access equipment worldwide
IPAF provides operator certification through PAL Cards that can be verified
IPAF offers a network of training centers for powered access equipment operators
IPAF publishes an annual Global Safety Report (2025 edition available)
IPAF publishes a UK Rental Activity Safety Report
IPAF encourages reporting of all accidents and near-misses to help save lives
Lithium Ferrophosphate (LFP) is the most common Li-ion battery type fitted to MEWPs
Incorrect battery charging on MEWPs can increase risk of fire or explosion
Li-ion batteries in MEWPs pose risks of fire, explosion, and thermal runaway
IPAF hosts global conferences including the IPAF Summit and International Awards for Powered Access (IAPAs)
IPAF has a Women in Powered Access Initiative to recognize women's contributions in the industry
entries.competitiveIntel: IPAF membership and training certification is an industry standard. Rental companies that are IPAF members and provide IPAF-trained operators may have a competitive advantage in demonstrating safety commitment to customers. Being listed in the IPAF Members Directory provides visibility to potential clients seeking reputable rental partners.
technicalKnowledge: MEWPs (Mobile Elevating Work Platforms) is the industry standard term for boom lifts and scissor lifts
Lithium Ferrophosphate (LFP) batteries are the most common Li-ion battery type in MEWPs
Li-ion batteries in MEWPs carry risk of fire, explosion, and thermal runaway
Battery charging on electrified MEWPs must follow manufacturer's instructions from the operators' manual
Incorrect battery charging can cause fire or explosion from transformers and/or charging equipment
PAL Cards serve as operator certification verification for powered access equipment
businessInsights: IPAF membership provides industry credibility and can be a differentiator for rental companies in South Florida
Ensuring all operators have valid PAL Cards demonstrates professionalism and safety commitment to clients
IPAF's accident reporting system and safety reports provide valuable data for improving fleet safety programs
IPAF toolbox talks on battery safety are directly relevant to maintaining electric boom and scissor lift fleets
The powered access industry is increasingly global with events in Germany, Brazil, Portugal, and Turkey indicating market expansion
IPAF's focus on Li-ion battery safety reflects the industry trend toward electrification of aerial work platforms
actionItems: Consider becoming an IPAF member to gain credibility, access safety resources, and be listed in the Members Directory
Ensure all Gorilla Rental operators receive IPAF training and maintain valid PAL Cards
Implement IPAF toolbox talks on Li-ion battery safety and charging lead safety for fleet maintenance staff
Establish an internal accident and near-miss reporting system aligned with IPAF guidelines
Review and distribute IPAF's Global Safety Report 2025 to management and safety teams
Use IPAF membership badge and training certifications in marketing materials to differentiate from competitors
Develop battery charging protocols for electric MEWPs based on IPAF guidelines and manufacturer instructions
Report any accidents to IPAF to contribute to industry safety data and demonstrate responsible operations
entries.rawContent:
IPAF - The International Powered Access Federation

IPAF promotes the safe and effective use of powered access equipment worldwide

IPAF promotes the safe and effective use of powered access equipment worldwide. Providing technical advice, influencing legislation, safety and training.

Report accidents, and help save lives!

entries.title: Gorilla Rental — Company Overview & Operations
entries.summary: Gorilla Rental is a South Florida aerial work platform rental company serving Broward County (primary), Miami-Dade, and Palm Beach. They offer boom lifts (40ft–125ft), scissor lifts (32ft electric), scaffolding, shore posts, and overhead protection to general contractors, painters, landscapers, roofers, and other trade professionals.
keyFacts: Gorilla Rental specializes in aerial work platform rentals in South Florida
Primary service area is Broward County, with coverage in Miami-Dade and Palm Beach
Boom lifts available from 40ft to 125ft reach in electric and diesel options
Scissor lifts available at 32ft electric
Scaffolding offered at a daily rate (modular)
Shore posts offered at a monthly rate
Overhead protection services available
Delivery fee is $200.00
Refundable deposit of $150.00 per rental
Florida sales tax of 7% applies to all rentals
Target customers include general contractors, painters, landscapers, roofers, drywall, framing, and excavation companies
Driver Andrei: +14474744549
Driver Nazar: +17860000000
Company phone: +14474744549
Company email: info@gorillarental.us
Company website: gorillarental.us
entries.competitiveIntel: Gorilla Rental operates in the competitive South Florida aerial lift rental market, differentiating through a broad range of equipment (boom lifts up to 125ft, scissor lifts, scaffolding, shore posts, overhead protection) and a straightforward pricing model with flat $200 delivery fee and $150 refundable deposit, targeting trade professionals across three major South Florida counties.

Scaffolding is modular and rented on a daily rate basis

Refundable deposit model ($150) incentivizes proper equipment care and return
Diverse customer base across multiple trades reduces dependency on any single industry segment
Small driver team (Andrei and Nazar) suggests lean operations with potential scaling needs as demand grows

entries.title: Gorilla Rental — Company Overview & Operations
entries.summary: Gorilla Rental is a South Florida aerial work platform rental company serving Broward County (primary), Miami-Dade, and Palm Beach. They offer boom lifts (40ft–125ft), scissor lifts (32ft electric), scaffolding, shore posts, and overhead protection to general contractors, painters, landscapers, roofers, drywall, framing, and excavation companies.
keyFacts: South Florida aerial work platform rental company
Primary service area: Broward County; also serves Miami-Dade and Palm Beach
Boom Lifts: 40ft to 125ft reach (electric and diesel options)
Scissor Lifts: 32ft electric
Scaffolding: modular, daily rate
Shore Posts: monthly rate
Overhead Protection available
Delivery fee: $200.00
Refundable deposit: $150.00 per rental
Florida sales tax: 7%
Driver Andrei: +14474744549
Driver Nazar: +17860000000
Email: info@gorillarental.us
Website: gorillarental.us
entries.competitiveIntel: Gorilla Rental operates in the competitive South Florida aerial lift rental market, differentiating with a broad equipment range (40ft–125ft boom lifts), flat-rate delivery pricing, and a relatively low refundable deposit, targeting trade contractors across three major counties.
technicalKnowledge: Boom lifts available in both electric and diesel powertrains, ranging from 40ft to 125ft reach
Scissor lifts are 32ft electric models suitable for indoor and outdoor use
Scaffolding is modular and priced on a daily rate basis
Shore posts are rented on a monthly rate basis
Overhead protection services are available for jobsite safety compliance
businessInsights: Target customer segments are trade-specific contractors (GCs, painters, landscapers, roofers, drywall, framing, excavation) — marketing should be tailored per trade
Flat $200 delivery fee simplifies quoting and reduces pricing friction
$150 refundable deposit per rental keeps barrier to entry low for smaller contractors
Broward County is the primary market — expansion opportunities exist in deeper Miami-Dade and Palm Beach penetration
7% Florida sales tax must be applied to all rental invoices
actionItems: Ensure all quotes include delivery fee ($200), deposit ($150), and 7% FL sales tax
Route delivery/pickup requests to drivers Andrei (+14474744549) or Nazar (+17860000000)
Direct customer inquiries to info@gorillarental.us or +14474744549
Confirm service area eligibility (Broward, Miami-Dade, Palm Beach) before booking

entries.title: United Rentals – Trusted Equipment Fleet & Worksite SolutionsUnited Rentals
entries.summary: This page is from United Rentals (not Blue Line Rental as the source URL suggests — Blue Line was acquired by United Rentals). United Rentals is the world's largest rental equipment company, offering 3,300+ equipment and tool classes across the US and Canada, with extensive digital tools, mobile apps, and industry-specific solutions.
keyFacts: United Rentals is the world's largest rental equipment company
Offers 3,300+ equipment and tool classes
Operates across the United States and Canada
Blue Line Rental domain now redirects to United Rentals (indicating acquisition/merger)
Provides AI-powered chatbot for equipment assistance
Offers mobile app for 24/7 equipment browsing, rental, and pickup requests
Has a training certification program called United Academy
Provides Worksite Performance Solutions for safety, productivity, and sustainability
Offers sustainability-focused equipment selection by emission level
Serves multiple industries including chemical, oil & gas, civil infrastructure, and distribution
Offers used equipment sales events (Spring Sales Event)
Provides government customer tax-exempt purchasing
Has operations in Europe (France, Germany, Netherlands) and North America
entries.competitiveIntel: United Rentals acquired Blue Line Rental, consolidating market share. As the world's largest equipment rental company with 3,300+ equipment classes, they represent Gorilla Rental's largest national competitor in South Florida. They heavily invest in digital tools (AI chatbot, mobile app, online dashboards, notifications) to create customer stickiness and streamline operations. They promote sustainability and emission-level equipment filtering as differentiators. Their scale allows them to offer broad industry-specific solutions (Power & HVAC, Trench Safety, Fluid Solutions, Emergency Response, Storage) that smaller competitors cannot match. Government customers receive special tax-exempt treatment. They also sell used equipment, creating an additional revenue stream. Their weaknesses for Gorilla may include less personalized local service and potentially higher pricing due to corporate overhead.
technicalKnowledge: United Rentals offers aerial attachments and safety accessories as a category
Equipment categories include skid steers, compact track loaders, straight mast rough terrain forklifts
They provide Power & HVAC, Fluid Solutions, and Trench Safety as specialized solution categories
Equipment can be filtered by emission level for sustainability compliance
businessInsights: Blue Line Rental has been absorbed by United Rentals, reducing the number of independent competitors in the market
Major competitors are investing heavily in digital customer experience (apps, AI chatbots, dashboards) to differentiate
United Rentals uses technology (Total Control dashboard, notifications, mobile app) to increase customer retention and reduce churn
The industry trend is toward sustainability-focused equipment offerings and emission-level transparency
Large competitors leverage scale to serve niche industries (chemical, oil & gas, oilfield services) that smaller companies may not target
Used equipment sales events represent an additional competitor revenue model
Online request submissions are promoted as 2x faster than emails/faxes, setting customer expectations for response times
actionItems: Differentiate Gorilla Rental through personalized local service, faster delivery, and South Florida market expertise that United Rentals cannot match at scale
Invest in digital presence — consider a simple mobile-friendly rental request system to compete with United Rentals' app experience
Emphasize Gorilla's specialization in aerial work platforms (boom lifts & scissor lifts) vs United Rentals' generalist 3,300-class approach
Monitor United Rentals' pricing in South Florida locations to ensure competitive positioning
Consider offering sustainability/emission-level information on equipment to match emerging industry expectations
Target customers who may feel underserved by United Rentals' large corporate structure with personalized account management
Ensure response times to customer inquiries are faster than United Rentals' digital-first approach to win on service quality
Note that Blue Line Rental no longer exists as an independent competitor — update competitive landscape accordingly
entries.rawContent:
United Rentals – Trusted Equipment Fleet & Worksite SolutionsUnited Rentals

United Rentals provides 3300+ equipment and tool classes for industrial & construction sites across the United States and Canada. Rent heavy equipment now.

We're here to help you find the right equipment for your project. How can I assist you today?
The AI-powered chatbot is an assistant that is provided for general information only and not for professional advice. The chatbot’s responses are generated by AI and may be inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated. They are provided for general informational purposes only and are not a substitute for your own judgment or information provided by a United Rentals representative. You are solely responsible for selecting equipment that is appropriate and safe for your job and jobsite. You must independently review and verify all results, which may be inaccurate, incomplete or outdated. For your protection, do not share sensitive personal information in the chat. By proceeding, you consent to the recording and sharing of your information by United Rentals (and authorized third parties).
I agree to the United Rentals Website Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
Al can make mistakes and is not a substitute for professional advice or judgment. Please verify important information.
